title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
We at Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Mysuru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises:
Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises!
